title: covellia congesta
intro: Covellia congesta, also known as the rock rose or Covellia, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of promoting tissue repair and reducing inflammation. Covellia congesta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or topical cream, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
